message:
Expand Google AI connector with new capabilities, types, and test coverage

manifest.toml: significantly expanded tool declarations with additional
parameter schemas, risk level classifications, and idempotency annotations
for newly supported Google AI operations.

client.rs: extended API client with additional request methods and
response handling for new Google AI service endpoints, improved error
propagation and retry context.

connector.rs: wired new operations into the connector dispatch layer,
added input/output type mappings, operation metadata (introspection,
risk levels, safety tiers), and simulation/dry-run support for new tools.

types.rs: added new request/response types for expanded Google AI
capabilities, with serde serialization and deny_unknown_fields validation.

integration.rs: expanded test suite covering new tool operations,
parameter validation, error scenarios, and operation metadata verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,13 +5,13 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:ad796a27e7d14a1e85304130e84cab97810330a53ad24cafbd9ddef06af03f9c"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:ea249a55b15230e0346c73ed5681aedf52b3f72f4d5019625d6ab5c6a4020310"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.google-ai"
 name = "Google AI Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "FCP connector for Google AI (Gemini) generative models — text generation, streaming, tool use, embeddings, token counting"
+description = "FCP connector for Google AI (Gemini) generative models — text generation, streaming, tool use, embeddings, token counting, and tuned model control-plane operations"
 archetypes = [
     "operational",
     "streaming",
@@ -534,6 +534,326 @@ common_mistakes = ["Not paginating results — if next_page_token is present in
 examples = ["{}"]
 related = ["google-ai.get_model"]
 
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create"]
+description = "Create a tuned model training job"
+capability = "google-ai.tuning"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "source_model",
+    "tuning_task",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema.properties.tuned_model_id]
+description = "Optional stable ID to assign to the tuned model"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema.properties.display_name]
+description = "Human-friendly tuned model name"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema.properties.description]
+description = "Operator-facing description of the tuned model"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema.properties.source_model]
+description = "Base model resource to tune, e.g. models/gemini-1.5-flash-001"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".input_schema.properties.tuning_task]
+description = "Training dataset and optional hyperparameters"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema]
+required = [
+    "name",
+    "done",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema.properties.name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema.properties.done]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema.properties.metadata]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema.properties.response]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".output_schema.properties.error]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["generativelanguage.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 60000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Start a tuned model training job after explicit approval for the spend and side effects."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Submitting empty or low-quality training examples.",
+    "Treating training as instantaneous instead of polling the returned operation.",
+]
+examples = ['{"tuned_model_id": "support-bot", "source_model": "models/gemini-1.5-flash-001", "tuning_task": {"training_data": {"examples": [{"text_input": "Refund request", "output": "billing"}]}}}']
+related = [
+    "google-ai.tuning.get_operation",
+    "google-ai.tuning.cancel",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list"]
+description = "List tuned models visible to the current credential"
+capability = "google-ai.tuning"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".input_schema.properties.page_size]
+minimum = 1
+maximum = 1000
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".input_schema.properties.page_token]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".output_schema]
+required = ["tuned_models"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".output_schema.properties.tuned_models]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".output_schema.properties.next_page_token]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["generativelanguage.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Discover tuned models before invoking or auditing them."
+common_mistakes = ["Forgetting to follow next_page_token when more results exist."]
+examples = ["{}", '{"page_size": 25}']
+related = ["google-ai.tuning.get"]
+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.get"]
+description = "Get metadata for one tuned model"
+capability = "google-ai.tuning"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"

+idempotency = "strict"

+

+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["generativelanguage.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000

+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Inspect one tuned model's state, source model, and tuning metadata."
+common_mistakes = ["Passing only a short nickname instead of the tuned model resource name."]
+examples = ['{"tuned_model": "tunedModels/support-bot"}']
+related = [

+    "google-ai.tuning.get_operation",

+
+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.get_operation"]

+risk_level = "low"

+related = [

+[provides.operations."google-ai.tuning.cancel".ai_hints]

+examples = ['{"operation": "tunedModels/support-bot/operations/op-123"}']
+related = ["google-ai.tuning.get_operation"]

 [event_caps]
 streaming = true
 replay = false
@@ -573,10 +893,22 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "google-ai.tuning"
+requests = 10
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 2
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "google-ai.list_models" = ["google-ai.models"]
 "google-ai.count_tokens" = ["google-ai.models"]
 "google-ai.get_model" = ["google-ai.models"]
+"google-ai.tuning.create" = ["google-ai.tuning"]
+"google-ai.tuning.list" = ["google-ai.tuning"]
+"google-ai.tuning.get" = ["google-ai.tuning"]
+"google-ai.tuning.get_operation" = ["google-ai.tuning"]
+"google-ai.tuning.cancel" = ["google-ai.tuning"]
 "google-ai.generate_content_stream" = ["google-ai.generate"]
 "google-ai.embed_content" = ["google-ai.embed"]
 "google-ai.get_usage" = ["google-ai.models"]
